requirement_topic.zh: 机械及物理安全（玩具条例）
requirement_topic.zht: 機械及物理安全（玩具條例）

summary.en: Toys supplied in Canada must comply with the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act and Toys Regulations SOR/2011-17. The Toys Regulations include packaging, electrical, mechanical, auditory, thermal, toxicological, and specific-product requirements, including small-parts, sharp-edge or sharp-point, pull/push toy, rattle, yo-yo ball, magnetic toy, and toy-entry hazards.
summary.zh: 在加拿大供应的玩具须符合《加拿大消费品安全法》和《玩具条例》SOR/2011-17。《玩具条例》涵盖包装、电气、机械、听觉、热、毒理及特定产品要求，包括小零件、锐边或锐点、拉推玩具、摇铃、悠悠球类玩具、磁性玩具以及儿童可进入玩具的危害。
summary.zht: 在加拿大供應的玩具須符合《加拿大消費品安全法》和《玩具條例》SOR/2011-17。《玩具條例》涵蓋包裝、電氣、機械、聽覺、熱、毒理及特定產品要求，包括小零件、銳邊或銳點、拉推玩具、搖鈴、悠悠球類玩具、磁性玩具以及兒童可進入玩具的危害。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (S.C. 2010, c. 21)

summary.en: China's GB 6675.1-2014 and GB 6675.2-2014 cover general, mechanical, and physical toy safety requirements and are commonly used for CCC toy certification in mainland China. They are technically aligned with ISO 8124-1 for many hazards, but China CCC or GB 6675 reports are not a Canadian legal approval.
summary.zh: 中国GB 6675.1-2014和GB 6675.2-2014覆盖玩具通用、机械及物理安全要求，通常用于中国大陆CCC玩具认证。其许多危害项目与ISO 8124-1技术对标，但中国CCC或GB 6675报告不是加拿大法律认可的准入批准。
summary.zht: 中國GB 6675.1-2014和GB 6675.2-2014覆蓋玩具通用、機械及物理安全要求，通常用於中國大陸CCC玩具認證。其許多危害項目與ISO 8124-1技術對標，但中國CCC或GB 6675報告不是加拿大法律認可的准入批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.1-2014 — Safety of toys — Basic code
GB 6675.2-2014 — Safety of toys — Mechanical and physical properties
CCC toy certification rules administered by CNCA/SAMR

gap.en: A China-ready toy must be mapped to Canadian regulatory clauses, not only to GB 6675. Verify Canadian small-parts cylinder, magnetic flux, impaction, entrapment, sharp point/edge, cord, projectile, and product-specific tests in the Toys Regulations. Importers should keep evidence of Canadian clause-by-clause compliance because there is no CE-style mark or pre-market federal certificate.
gap.zh: 面向中国市场合规的玩具须逐条映射到加拿大法规条款，而不能只依据GB 6675。需核验《玩具条例》中的加拿大小零件量筒、磁通量、冲击、夹陷、锐点/锐边、绳索、弹射物及特定产品测试。由于加拿大没有CE式标志或联邦上市前证书，进口商应保存逐条符合加拿大要求的证据。
gap.zht: 面向中國市場合規的玩具須逐條映射到加拿大法規條款，而不能只依據GB 6675。需核驗《玩具條例》中的加拿大小零件量筒、磁通量、衝擊、夾陷、銳點/銳邊、繩索、彈射物及特定產品測試。由於加拿大沒有CE式標誌或聯邦上市前證書，進口商應保存逐條符合加拿大要求的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CCPSA and Toys Regulations apply to toys manufactured, imported, advertised, or sold in Canada
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 6675 / CCC applies to most toy categories sold in mainland China

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Canadian toy mechanical and physical safety must be checked directly against SOR/2011-17. GB 6675 and CCC evidence can support engineering review, but it does not replace Canada-specific compliance evidence under the CCPSA.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】加拿大玩具机械及物理安全须直接按SOR/2011-17核查。GB 6675和CCC证据可支持工程审查，但不能替代CCPSA项下的加拿大专用合规证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】加拿大玩具機械及物理安全須直接按SOR/2011-17核查。GB 6675和CCC證據可支持工程審查，但不能替代CCPSA項下的加拿大專用合規證據。
